final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original UI design system showcase illustration featuring a web Dashboard, mobile interface, cards, buttons, and controls.

Style/medium: needs a classic minimalist tech aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include multiple UI layers: web Dashboard panel, mobile interface frame, card components, button sets, and control widgets arranged in a visually hierarchical layout
Subject: must include all UI components:
  Dashboard: web Dashboard layout with data visualizations
  Mobile: mobile interface screen
  Components: cards / buttons / controls / widgets
Scene/backdrop: needs a deep-tech dark environment — exact backdrop treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a high-tech, visually striking atmosphere with strong depth and layering — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a cool-toned tech direction — exact accent colors and gradients are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sleek, glassy, high-contrast surface treatment — exact sheen and depth are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve clear visual hierarchy across all UI layers; all components must be legible and distinct
Avoid: flat, dull, low-contrast, or cluttered layouts
